channel.title: Coding on ijadux2's website
channel.description: Recent content in Coding on ijadux2's website

item.title: happy-moments
item.description:
happy-moments

For the longest time, I felt like I was living a life that belonged to someone else. In my house, the word “career” was basically a synonym for “Medicine.” My parents had this vision of me in a white coat, a stethoscope around my neck, carrying the title of Doctor. And because I love them, I tried to want it too.

But every time I sat down to study, my mind would wander to logic, loops, and building things from scratch. I didn’t want to study anatomy; I wanted to understand architecture—the digital kind.

item.title: Neovim and journey of coding
item.description:
Neovim

i use neovim for most for the time in my laptop. using archlinux with Noctalia shell, custome plugins and config

  • Sharingan.nvim

  • my neovim consist of

    • plugin managaer
    • theme {catppuccin-mocha}
    • my custome plugins {git,app-launcher,tangle,etc}

  • github plugins

    • my fav. snacks.nvim
    • and many more

just not becasue of plugins i like neovim i like becasue of speed and terminal based editor

my coding journey

when i was introduced by linux in 2020 it was hard for me to use
